integration_tests.reason: mod_test requires KVM hardware virtualization support (unavailable in Docker container) and STRATOVIRT_BINARY/VIRTIOFSD_BINARY environment variables

issues_encountered.issue: dnf-installed Rust 1.82.0 does not support edition2024 feature
issues_encountered.resolution: Remove dnf Rust packages, install Rust 1.96.0 via rustup with tuna mirror (RUSTUP_DIST_SERVER=https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/rustup)

issues_encountered.issue: Container missing git, cargo cannot update crate index
issues_encountered.resolution: Install git via dnf install -y git

issues_encountered.issue: crates.io rate limiting blocks crate downloads
issues_encountered.resolution: Configure cargo mirror to tuna: replace-with = "tuna", registry = "https://mirrors.tuna.tsinghua.edu.cn/git/crates.io-index.git"

issues_encountered.issue: Tuna mirror intermittent timeouts during crate download
issues_encountered.resolution: Cargo automatic retry mechanism handled all timeouts successfully

issues_encountered.issue: RPM database corruption after killing stuck dnf process
rustup download failure from static.rust-lang.org (HTTP/2 PROTOCOL_ERROR)

conclusion.summary: StratoVirt 2.5.0 repository builds successfully on openEuler 24.03 LTS with Rust 1.96.0. All 410 unit tests across 16 modules passed with 0 failures. The binary (92MB) was generated successfully. Integration tests (mod_test) were skipped due to KVM hardware virtualization requirement unavailable in Docker container environment.
recommendations: Run integration tests (mod_test) on bare-metal or KVM-enabled host for full validation
Pre-install git in the container image to avoid cargo index update failures
Use rustup (not dnf) for Rust toolchain to ensure edition2024 compatibility
Pre-configure cargo mirror in container image to avoid crates.io rate limiting
Consider increasing container memory limit for faster parallel compilation
